headline: DLTR Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Margin Gains and Higher Comps
summary: Dollar Tree beats Q1 estimates as stronger comps, margin gains and lower freight costs lift earnings, while FY26 EPS guidance moves higher.

headline: BBWI Stock Jumps 10% on Q1 Earnings Beat & Growth Strategy Optimism
summary: Bath & Body Works beats Q1 earnings estimates as Consumer First Formula gains traction, with management targeting stronger momentum through 2026 and 2027.
